subject: ARALING_PANLIPUNAN
title: Reading Hazard-Sensitive Locations
objective: Basahin ang child-safe hazard overlay at sundin ang opisyal na gabay.
introduction: Ang hazard exposure ay hindi kapareho ng buong risk; mahalaga rin ang gusali, paghahanda, at vulnerability. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Reading Hazard-Sensitive Locations”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Ang hazard exposure ay hindi kapareho ng buong risk; mahalaga rin ang gusali, paghahanda, at vulnerability.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “Reading Hazard-Sensitive Locations”?

options.text: Ang hazard exposure ay hindi kapareho ng buong risk; mahalaga rin ang gusali, paghahanda, at vulnerability.
Tawaging tiyak na ligtas ang lugar
Gamitin ang app bilang emergency authority

items.explanation: The correct response is “Ang hazard exposure ay hindi kapareho ng buong risk; mahalaga rin ang gusali, paghahanda, at vulnerability.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang hazard exposure ay hindi kapareho ng buong risk; mahalaga rin ang gusali, paghahanda, at vulnerability.

options.text: Tawaging tiyak na ligtas ang lugar
Gamitin ang app bilang emergency authority

items.explanation: The correct response is “bahang overlay” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang hazard exposure ay hindi kapareho ng buong risk; mahalaga rin ang gusali, paghahanda, at vulnerability.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?

options.text: Tawaging tiyak na ligtas ang lugar
evacuation point ayon sa opisyal na mapa

items.explanation: The correct response is “Tawaging tiyak na ligtas ang lugar” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang hazard exposure ay hindi kapareho ng buong risk; mahalaga rin ang gusali, paghahanda, at vulnerability.

items.prompt: Sino ang dapat sundin sa aktuwal na emergency?

options.text: responsableng adult at opisyal na awtoridad

items.explanation: The correct response is “responsableng adult at opisyal na awtoridad” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang hazard exposure ay hindi kapareho ng buong risk; mahalaga rin ang gusali, paghahanda, at vulnerability.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?

options.text: Tawaging tiyak na ligtas ang lugar

items.explanation: The correct response is “makinig sa adult at awtoridad” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang hazard exposure ay hindi kapareho ng buong risk; mahalaga rin ang gusali, paghahanda, at vulnerability.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Reading Hazard-Sensitive Locations; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Reading Hazard-Sensitive Locations.
